name: rockstarr-content
description: Rockstarr AI long-form drafting plugin. Four publishing lanes (researched blog, thought leadership, email newsletter, LinkedIn newsletter) gated by the client's stack cadence, plus interview-driven case studies and repurposed derivatives. Every lane drafts in the client's approved voice from first-party knowledge base material; third-party sources live in References only. Monthly planning pass (ideate → pick → calendar → approve) then per-piece drafting on the calendar's schedule. All outputs land in 03_drafts/content/ for human review. Requires rockstarr-infra v0.4+ for the content-cadence stack fields and shared case-study prompt.
